title: nidorella resedifolia
intro: Nidorella resedifolia, also known as the Cape daisy bush or Reseda bush, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family, commonly found in southern Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Nidorella resedifolia include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic to prevent infection. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, making it a versatile remedy for various health issues.
